creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: wen
Date: Mon Sep 17 12:37:40 2012
New Revision: 304396
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/304396

Log:
  Linnya is an excellent multimedia application for Unix-like OS users,
  which supports music library, playlist, lyrics, and more.
  
  WWW: http://www.linnya.org
  
  PR:		171321
  Submitted by:	XiaoQI Ge <ghw@7axu.com>

Added:
  head/audio/linnya/
  head/audio/linnya/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/audio/linnya/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/audio/linnya/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
  head/audio/linnya/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)

Added: head/audio/linnya/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/audio/linnya/Makefile	Mon Sep 17 12:37:40 2012	(r304396)
@@ -0,0 +1,35 @@
+# New ports collection makefile for:	linnya
+# Date created:				1 Sep 2012
+# Whom:					XiaoQI Ge <ghw@7axu.com>
+# $FreeBSD$
+
+PORTNAME=	linnya
+PORTVERSION=	2.2.0
+CATEGORIES=	audio
+
+MAINTAINER=	ghw@7axu.com
+COMMENT=	A Linnya Audio Player
+
+LICENSE=	GPLv3
+
+USE_GITHUB=	yes
+GH_ACCOUNT=	herenvarno
+GH_COMMIT=	6724a9b
+
+USE_AUTOTOOLS=	aclocal automake
+GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
+USE_GMAKE=	yes
+USE_GNOME=	gtk30
+USE_SQLITE=	3
+USE_GETTEXT=	yes
+USE_GSTREAMER=	good mp3 ogg
+MAKE_JOBS_SAFE=	yes
+USE_AUTOTOOLS=	libtool
+USE_LDCONFIG=	yes
+INSTALLS_ICONS=	yes
+WANT_GNOME=	yes
+
+BUILD_DEPENDS+=	curl:${PORTSDIR}/ftp/curl
+RUN_DEPENDS+=	curl:${PORTSDIR}/ftp/curl
+
+.include <bsd.port.mk>

Added: head/audio/linnya/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/audio/linnya/distinfo	Mon Sep 17 12:37:40 2012	(r304396)
@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+SHA256 (linnya-2.2.0.tar.gz) = c8add0b693cb882f45522231e585c3edb8adf1a33d59a0f1070fe84a8a64df6e
+SIZE (linnya-2.2.0.tar.gz) = 841288

Added: head/audio/linnya/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/audio/linnya/pkg-descr	Mon Sep 17 12:37:40 2012	(r304396)
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+Linnya is an excellent multimedia application for Unix-like OS users,
+which supports music library, playlist, lyrics, and more.
+
+WWW: http://www.linnya.org
